passage.title: A Day with Reported Speech Part 1 — Statements
passage.text: He said, "I am tired." He said that he was tired. She said, "I go to school." She said that she went to school. They said, "We are happy." They said that they were happy. He said, "I have eaten food." He said that he had eaten food. He said, "I am doing this." He said that he was doing this.
passage.hindiTranslation: उसने कहा, "मैं थका हुआ हूँ।" उसने कहा कि वह थका हुआ था। उसने कहा, "मैं स्कूल जाती हूँ।" उसने कहा कि वह स्कूल जाती थी। उन्होंने कहा, "हम खुश हैं।" उन्होंने कहा कि वे खुश थे। उसने कहा, "मैंने खाना खा लिया है।" उसने कहा कि उसने खाना खा लिया था। उसने कहा, "मैं यह कर रहा हूँ।" उसने कहा कि वह यह कर रहा था।

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "He said, "I am..."?
options: He said that he had eaten food.
He said, "This is true."
He said that he was tired.
He said, "I am tired."
comprehensionQuestions.explanation: Stated in the passage: "He said, "I am tired.""

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "He said that he..."?
options: He said, "I am doing this."

She said, "I go to school."
He said that he was tired.
comprehensionQuestions.answer: He said that he was tired.
comprehensionQuestions.explanation: Stated in the passage: "He said that he was tired."
